title: Ai vs Human in an epic fight for $10,000
author: TrangDunlap
selftext:
Ok, it's not so epic. So I found a contest by LimeX. Basically, they want you to pitch an idea for a new feature for an  API. I tried cheesing it by asking chatgpt but all the ideas were kind of lame and unoriginal. As to be expected to be honest. So I turn to you!

 Can we come up with better new features for an API than an AI?
